sections.cot_settings: CoT Inputs, Outputs, and Streams map to cot_inputs, cot_outputs, cot_streams
sections.nw_settings: NWSharedPreferences plugin settings — use Custom Preferences for keys not in the schema
sections.unset_behavior: Leave fields blank or Off to omit from the generated .pref file

groups.name: cot_inputs
groups.title: CoT Input
groups.description: Receive CoT messages on the device (e.g. multicast on a specified port).

groups.name: cot_outputs
groups.title: CoT Output
groups.description: Send CoT messages to configured endpoints.

groups.name: cot_streams
groups.title: CoT Stream
groups.description: Streaming TAK server connections. Required fields: Description and Connect String.

connection_fields.title: Connection
connection_fields.help: Built from protocol, host, port, and interface below.

fields.title: Enable Logcat File
fields.summary: If checked a log file will capture the Android (logcat) logging output while the app is running. The log file is generated in the app support directory, is named logcat.txt, and is overwritten after each run of the application.

fields.title: Enable Logcat Errors only
fields.summary: If checked the log file will only capture error level diagnostic information while the app is running.

fields.title: Upload Debug Logs
fields.summary: If checked debug logs (Logcat and Network Traffic) will be uploaded to TAK Server.

fields.title: Collect Metrics
fields.summary: Enable usage and metrics data to be collected and recorded in directory: support/logs\nPlease note that this will cause an app performance penalty due to consumption of system resources.

fields.title: Log Network Traffic
fields.summary: If checked captures all outgoing network traffic to a Comma Separated Values (CSV) file.

fields.title: Advanced CoT Recorder
fields.summary: If checked captures all incoming and outgoing Cursor on Target traffic and saves each message based on its event type into directory: tools/metrics/cot. Each message is saved under a subdirectory as an individual file [type]/[type]-timestamp.xml. This can be used to generate and refine XSD schemas.

fields.title: Advanced CoT Details Recorder
fields.summary: If checked captures all incoming and outgoing Cursor on Target traffic and extracts only the nested details into directory: tools/metrics/details. Each detail is saved under a subdirectory as an individual file [element]/[element]-timestamp.xml. This can be used to generate and refine XSD schemas.

fields.title: Logging Impact on Performance
fields.summary: Please note that logging and metrics collection will cause an app performance penalty. Care should be taken to only enable these settings during a diagnostic period, and should remain off during normal app usage due to consumption of system resources.

fields.title: Notification
fields.summary: Display an Android notification during alert.

fields.title: Individual Alert Notifications
fields.summary: Allows for individual notifications to be sent as well as a summary count of the number of alerts. If false, it will only produce the summary count.

fields.title: Audible alert
fields.summary: Sound an audible alert during alert.

fields.title: Vibration alert
fields.summary: Vibrate device during alert.

fields.title: Alert SMS Numbers
fields.summary: When the "Send SMS" checkbox is checked and an alert is issued, these numbers will automatically receive an SMS.

fields.title: Plugin Loading
fields.summary: Enable to load plugins during startup

fields.title: Auto Sync
fields.summary: Enable to check for app updates during startup. Disable to only check after an ATAK version upgrade

fields.title: Update Server
fields.summary: Enable to allow Over the Air updates from a remote TAK Update Server

fields.title: Update Server URL
fields.summary: Edit URL of the remote TAK Update Server

fields.title: Quick Configure Update Server URL from a TAK Server
fields.summary: Allows for quick configuration of the update server url based on a selected TAK Server.

fields.title: Update Server SSL/TLS TrustStore Location
fields.summary: The PKCS12 keystore with your Update Server Certificate Authorities (.p12 file)

fields.title: Local APK directory
fields.summary: Directory on the local device containing app/plugin APKs to load

fields.title: Reset the Local APK Directory Choice
fields.summary: Resets the Local APK directory back to the default setting choice

fields.title: Unit Display Format Preferences
fields.summary: Access preferences related to default display for units of measurement, angles, and coordinates.

fields.title: Enable Zoom Controls
fields.summary: Display zoom controls on screen

fields.title: Enable Zoom Eye Altitude Controls
fields.summary: Display user zoom eye altitude on screen

fields.title: Enable Map Scale Display
fields.summary: Enables a visual Map Scale on the map.

fields.title: Enable Map Scale Rounding
fields.summary: Adjust scale line to the nearest power of 10.

fields.title: Designate the Map Center
fields.summary: Display a crosshair that is visible on the screen and additionally display the coordinates on the bottom of the screen.

fields.title: Self Coordinate Information
fields.summary: Set where self coordinate information is displayed on the screen.

fields.title: SidePane Handle Shade
fields.summary: Select the SidePane handle style.

fields.title: Coordinate Entry Tabs
fields.summary: Allow the user to select which default coordinate entry tabs to display by default

fields.title: Display Bloodhound Text Widget
fields.summary: Enable to display the Bloodhound widget.

fields.title: Display Large Bloodhound Text Widget
fields.summary: Enable large text in the Bloodhound widget.

fields.title: Flash When Closing In
fields.summary: Flash the Bloodhound Text Widget and pairing line when close to the target.

fields.title: Toggle Auto Zoom
fields.summary: Enable Auto Zoom feature to display self and DP in map view when tool is first launched.

fields.title: Flash ETA Threshold
fields.summary: Specify the ETA (in seconds) for when to flash when closing in

fields.title: Outer/Middle ETA Threshold
fields.summary: Specify the ETA (in seconds) for the outer/middle radius

fields.title: Middle/Inner ETA Threshold
fields.summary: Specify the ETA (in seconds) for the middle/inner radius

fields.title: Flash Color
fields.summary: Set the color of the bloodhound line\'s flash.

fields.title: Outer ETA Color
fields.summary: Set the color of the bloodhound line\'s outer radius.

fields.title: Middle ETA Color
fields.summary: Set the color of the bloodhound line\'s middle radius.

fields.title: Inner ETA Color
fields.summary: Set the color of the bloodhound line\'s inner radius.

fields.title: Reroute distance
fields.summary: Specify the distance away from the route a point has to move before calculating a reroute.

fields.title: Reroute timer frequency
fields.summary: Specify how frequently bloodhound will check to see if a reroute needs to be calculated.

fields.title: Bluetooth Support
fields.summary: Turn on scanning for bluetooth devices (e.g. LRF and GPS).

fields.title: Bluetooth Reconnect Time
fields.summary: Number of seconds to attempt to reconnect dropped Bluetooth connections.

fields.title: Log Tracks
fields.summary: Log your tracks.

fields.title: Track Prefix
fields.summary: Prefix for self-track history segments

fields.title: Auto Rotate Track Colors
fields.summary: Check to change color of each new track segment, uncheck to use default track color each time.

fields.title: CSV Export Header
fields.summary: Include column headers for CSV exports.

fields.title: KML Export Timestamps
fields.summary: Check to use gx:Track with timestamps (more detailed info), uncheck to use LineString (more compatibility).

fields.title: Server track time gap (minutes)
fields.summary: When searching the server for tracks, split into separate tracks when consecutive breadcrumbs are temporally more than this far apart (default: 10 minutes).

fields.title: Persistent Self Track
fields.summary: Check to display all tracks since startup.

fields.title: Set Max Number of Bread Crumbs
fields.summary: Max number of Bread Crumbs on-screen.

fields.title: Render bread crumb line to ground in 3-D
fields.summary: When rendering the bread crumb trail in 3-D view, draw a line to the ground for each crumb.

fields.title: Default Crumb Size
fields.summary: The default size for breadcrumbs to appear on the map.

fields.title: Bread Crumb Distance Threshold
fields.summary: Set how far you must move before dropping a crumb (default: 2 meters).

fields.title: My Callsign
fields.summary: Specifies the callsign for this device.

fields.title: My Team
fields.summary: Select your team.

fields.title: My Role
fields.summary: Specifies the role of this device

fields.title: Remarks
fields.summary: Provides additional remarks to be transmitted when sending out information to other TAK users on the network. Note that this can include hashtags.

fields.title: Callsign Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust how this device is seen on the network

fields.title: Device Preferences
fields.summary: Access general display preferences such as font size, icon scaling, brightness, and illumination of soft keys.

fields.title: Bluetooth
fields.summary: Turn on scanning for bluetooth devices (e.g. LRF and GPS).

fields.title: Display Notification
fields.summary: Display a notification whenever a new Chat message is received.

fields.title: Vibrate phone
fields.summary: Vibrate the phone whenever a new Chat message is received (notifications required).

fields.title: Audible Chat notifications
fields.summary: Play default notification sound whenever a new Chat message is received (notifications required).

fields.title: Export Chat History
fields.summary: Write entire chat history to CSV file on disk.

fields.title: Clear History
fields.summary: Clear Chat History.

fields.title: Chat Address
fields.summary: Address to send chat messages. Must match other GeoChat providers.

fields.title: Chat Port
fields.summary: Port to send chat messages. Must match other GeoChat providers.

fields.title: Publish Phone Number
fields.summary: Display phone number (if available) to other users and allow direct phone calls and SMS messages (if supported) by both devices

fields.title: Alternative Phone Number
fields.summary: Specify a phone number instead of the one discovered on the device.

fields.title: Prefer Alternative Number
fields.summary: Prioritize sending the alternative phone number when sending out contact information.

fields.title: Publish VoIP Number
fields.summary: Specifies whether to publish VoIP address, and whether to configure automatically or manually.

fields.title: VoIP Number
fields.summary: VoIP number or SIP address for VoIP calling. Leave blank to not publish.

fields.title: Publish XMPP Username
fields.summary: XMPP/Jabber chat username. Leave blank to not publish.

fields.title: Publish Preferred Email
fields.summary: Preferred email address. Leave blank to not publish.

fields.title: Unit Reference Number
fields.summary: Identifying number assigned to this device for use in legacy systems. This is an assigned number and should not be set unless provided.

fields.title: Media Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust Image and Video Media Preferences

fields.title: Lock Behavior
fields.summary: Enabling this preference will result in the self marker remaining centered while moving in track up mode. This overrides the default behavior of floating the self icon to the bottom of the screen when moving to give the user a more 360 degree view.

fields.title: Stale Data Preferences
fields.summary: Enable to immediately stale out remote users when they disconnect from TAK Server, or when you disconnect from TAK Server. Disable to use last received stale time.

fields.title: User Touch Preferences
fields.summary: Preferences to modify how the device responds to user Touch

fields.title: Additional Self Coordinate Controls
fields.summary: Changes to the actions associated with the Self Coordinate Display

fields.title: Scroll to Self Marker Location on Start
fields.summary: During startup, attempt to center the screen on your self marker location.   If the self location is not known during startup, restore the last viewed location.

fields.title: Disable EUD Link Capability
fields.summary: Disables the ability for the device be linked to an enterprise account for distribution of plugins and data.

fields.title: Ignore Global Language Settings
fields.summary: Force the application to run in English only and ignore the global language setting in Android.  A restart is necessary for this option to take effect.

fields.title: Override Permission Request
fields.summary: Enabling this feature will allow for the required permissions to be bypassed and still allow for ATAK to be run.    The capabilities will be limited and this will not provide for an optimal user experience and is not recommended.  Plugins may crash as they expect access to the permissions.  Additionally, Android may remove previously approved permissions at any time degrading the user experience even further.

fields.title: Pull Elevation Mode
fields.summary: Configure the default behavior for pulling elevation during coordinate entry

fields.title: Toolbar Side
fields.summary: Set which side of the screen to display the main toolbar.

fields.title: Toolbar Icon Color
fields.summary: Set the color of the toolbar icons. Note: Some plugin icons may not blend well with the applied coloring.

fields.title: Toolbar Background Color
fields.summary: Set the background color of the toolbar. Note: Background color will be transparent.

fields.title: Reset Toolbar Colors To Default
fields.summary: Resets the toolbar icon and background color back to the default settings.

fields.title: Force Extra Icons in Landscape
fields.summary: If the device is primarily being used in landscape mode, force an extra number of tool slots to mimic legacy behavior.

fields.title: Device Information
fields.summary: Hardware Details for remote help and support.

fields.title: My Callsign
fields.summary: Specifies the callsign for this device.

fields.title: My Team
fields.summary: Select your team.

fields.title: My Role
fields.summary: Specifies the role of this device

fields.title: My Display Type
fields.summary: Specifies the type that the world will see this device as

fields.title: Remarks
fields.summary: Provides additional remarks to be transmitted when sending out information to other TAK users on the network. Note that this can include hashtags.

fields.title: GPS Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust Network GPS Preferences

fields.title: Laser Range Finder Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust the Laser Range Finder Preferences

fields.title: Symbology Provider
fields.summary: Choose Symbology

fields.title: Use Wave Relay Callsign
fields.summary: If available, use the Callsign of the WR radio for mocking.

fields.title: My Location Color / Size
fields.summary: Customize your location marker by color or size.

fields.title: Tool Bar Customization
fields.summary: Customize toolbar icon and background colors

fields.title: Pull Elevation Mode
fields.summary: Configure the default behavior for pulling elevation during coordinate entry

fields.title: Force DTED Elevation
fields.summary: When enabled, this will force the usage of DTED elevation data during usage of the Point Dropper Tool, Red X Tool, and Digital Pointer Tool. Note that other tool workflows will also be forced to use DTED elevation.

fields.title: Elevation Server
fields.summary: The publicly facing elevation server to pull data from.

fields.title: Elevation Downloader
fields.summary: Attempts to mass download elevation data for the entire world from the server and gives the user options for which hemisphere they are in.

fields.title: Stream Elevation Data
fields.summary: Stream elevation data when missing instead of downloading the entire world.

fields.title: Change Encryption Passphrase
fields.summary: Allow for changes to the encryption passphrase protecting databases containing map items, location information and chat.

fields.title: Display Shape Label
fields.summary: Display shape labels for File Overlays shapes.

fields.title: DP Update Period
fields.summary: The maximum delay between sending updates for the DP point, if enabled (in seconds) even if the DP is not modified.   Moving a DP point locally will generate updates immediately.

fields.title: Legacy SPI Toolbar Mode
fields.summary: Enables the display of the legacy toolbar which has an additional range and bearing tool.

fields.title: Number of DPs
fields.summary: Number of DPs to show in the Digital Pointer toolbar.

fields.title: DP/RedX FAH Width
fields.summary: Sets the width of the FAH cone (in degrees) when enabled from a DP or the Red X (rounds to the closest increment of 10).

fields.title: Expanded Danger Close Search
fields.summary: Consider Neutrals and Unknowns when determining a danger close situation.

fields.title: Bullseye Radius
fields.summary: The size of the bullseye as specified in meters when launched from the radial menu.   If using the bullseye tool directly this value will not be used

fields.title: Bullseye Ring Count
fields.summary: The default number of rings in a bullseye.

fields.title: Bullseye Ring Radius
fields.summary: The default spacing of the bullseye rings as specified in meters.

fields.title: Bullseye Rings Visibility
fields.summary: If checked the rings will initially be visible when creating a bullseye.

fields.title: Bullseye Arrow Direction
fields.summary: If checked the arrow will point to the center of the bullseye by default.

fields.title: Rapid MGRS Entry Mode
fields.summary: When long pressing to drop a point from the point dropper tool, use the MGRS optimized coordinate entry.

fields.title: GoTo Use Last Point
fields.summary: When starting up the GoTo tool, populate with last point entered during a session.

fields.title: Automatically Broadcast a Marker
fields.summary: Change the time between updates for markers being broadcasted.   This feature needs to be selected in the Detail page for the marker.   If the value is set to 0, then feature is disabled.

fields.title: Enable Auto Broadcast Stale Timeout
fields.summary: Applies a stale timeout when auto broadcasting a marker.

fields.title: Auto Broadcast Stale Timeout
fields.summary: The stale timeout period when auto broadcasting a marker. The marker will stale out on receiving devices if no update is received after the timeout period elapses. Only applies when auto broadcast stale time is enabled.

fields.title: Allow remote deletion of Auto Send items
fields.summary: If a marker is deleted when autobroadcast is enabled, attempt to delete the marker by sending a remote deletion command.

fields.title: Enable Address Lookup (Geocoder)
fields.summary: Enable to add the Address tab for coordinate entry.

fields.title: Address Provider
fields.summary: Select the address provider.

fields.title: Grid Line Color
fields.summary: Select a color to make grid lines more visible

fields.title: Show by Default
fields.summary: Default grid lines to showing on startup

fields.title: Grid Line Display Type
fields.summary: Select the type of values used to represent the grid lines.

fields.title: Imported Shape Outline Color
fields.summary: Default outline color for imported shapes.

fields.title: Internal Network Configuration
fields.summary: Attempt network configuration of a directly connected device.\nPlease Note:    It is not recommended that ATAK handle the internal network configuration of USB ethernet devices.   This is better handled by an external application such as the Network Monitor Application, which can be found under Preferences:Apps.   External monitoring of the connection will better handle network disconnects and reconnects.

fields.title: DHCP
fields.summary: Check to Enable DHCP.

fields.title: Layer Outline Color
fields.summary: Select a color to make the layer outlines more visible.

fields.title: Show by Default
fields.summary: Enable to display layer outlines on startup

fields.title: Force Center while Moving
fields.summary: Enabling this preference will result in the self marker remaining centered while moving in track up mode. This overrides the default behavior of floating the self icon to the bottom of the screen when moving to give the user a more 360 degree view.

fields.title: Crash logs
fields.summary: Details about app crashes are recorded in directory: support/logs

fields.title: Send App Logs Now
fields.summary: Touch to export app logs now.

fields.title: Auto Upload App Logs
fields.summary: Enable to upload app logs to TAK Server during app startup.

fields.title: Collect Metrics
fields.summary: Enable usage and metrics data to be collected and recorded in directory: support/logs\nPlease note that this will cause an app performance penalty due to consumption of system resources.

fields.title: Live Metrics
fields.summary: Enable usage and metrics data to be sent to TAK Server periodically while app is running.   This will consume higher than normal bandwidth.

fields.title: Advanced Logging
fields.summary: Manage advanced logging of debug and low level app data.

fields.title: Non-Bluetooth Laser Range Finders Support
fields.summary: Enable support for Laser Ranger Finders that are not attached by Bluetooth. This is a case for laser range finders that are managed by Serial Monitor

fields.title: Device Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust how this device is seen on the network

fields.title: Display Preferences
fields.summary: Access general display preferences such as font size, icon scaling, brightness, and illumination of soft keys.

fields.title: Network Preferences
fields.summary: Access network preferences such as identifying information, location preferences, and network configuration.

fields.title: Control Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust Control Preferences

fields.title: Accounts
fields.summary: Manage account credentials.

fields.title: Support
fields.summary: Support & Program Documentation

fields.title: Secure Delete Timeout
fields.summary: Amount of seconds to wait for deletions to finish before forcing shutdown.

fields.title: Force Reset Layer Cache
fields.summary: Forces a clean and rescan of layer data.

fields.title: Prefer KLV Frame Center Elevation
fields.summary: Use Frame Center elevation data provided in KLV instead of local elevation data.

fields.title: Camera Application
fields.summary: Select the application to be used for quick pictures

fields.title: Prompt Name When Taking Photos
fields.summary: If checked, taking a photo with the QuicPic will prompt you to provide a name to be applied to the image.

fields.title: Logging Impact on Performance
fields.summary: Please note that logging and metrics collection will cause an app performance penalty. Care should be taken to only enable these settings during a diagnostic period, and should remain off during normal app usage due to consumption of system resources.

fields.title: Collect Metrics
fields.summary: Enable usage and metrics data to be collected and recorded in directory: support/logs\nPlease note that this will cause an app performance penalty due to consumption of system resources.

fields.title: Live Metrics
fields.summary: Enable usage and metrics data to be sent to TAK Server periodically while app is running.   This will consume higher than normal bandwidth.

fields.title: Advanced CoT Recorder
fields.summary: If checked captures all incoming and outgoing Cursor on Target traffic and saves each message based on its event type into directory: tools/metrics/cot. Each message is saved under a subdirectory as an individual file [type]/[type]-timestamp.xml. This can be used to generate and refine XSD schemas.

fields.title: Advanced CoT Details Recorder
fields.summary: If checked captures all incoming and outgoing Cursor on Target traffic and extracts only the nested details into directory: tools/metrics/details. Each detail is saved under a subdirectory as an individual file [element]/[element]-timestamp.xml. This can be used to generate and refine XSD schemas.

fields.title: Enable file sharing.
fields.summary: Enable file sharing.

fields.title: File Transfer Max size
fields.summary: Disallow transfer of files if total size (MB) is above this threshold.

fields.title: Overlay Manager Mass Visibility Toggle
fields.summary: In the overlay manager, allow for the mass visibility toggle for all data packages at once. This does not impact the individual data package visibility toggle.

fields.title: Download attempts
fields.summary: Number of times to attempt to download a file from the remote Server.

fields.title: Allow HTTP transfers
fields.summary: Allow for HTTP transfers for legacy clients

fields.title: Server port
fields.summary: Port of the file sharing Server.

fields.title: Secure Server port
fields.summary: Secure port of the file sharing Server

fields.title: File Transfer Connection Timeout
fields.summary: Re-attempt the transfer if no connection is detected within this period (in seconds).

fields.title: File Transfer Failure Timeout
fields.summary: Re-attempt the transfer if not progress is detected within this period (in seconds).

fields.title: Use All Servers
fields.summary: Allows for publication of a Data Package to any configured TAK server regardless of connection state.

fields.title: Callsign and Device Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust how this device is seen on the network

fields.title: Network Preferences
fields.summary: Access network preferences such as identifying information, location preferences, and network configuration.

fields.title: Tool Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust the Tools and Plugins Preferences

fields.title: Display Preferences
fields.summary: Access general display preferences such as font size, icon scaling, brightness, and illumination of soft keys.

fields.title: Control Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust Control Preferences

fields.title: Legacy Preferences
fields.summary: Display older legacy device preferences. These preferences may be removed in future versions.

fields.title: Accounts
fields.summary: Manage account credentials.

fields.title: Support
fields.summary: Support & Program Documentation

fields.title: Manage Server Connections
fields.summary: Tap to manage connections to TAK Server

fields.title: Display Connection Widget
fields.summary: Enable to display connectivity indicator on map above local device location widget.

fields.title: Monitor Server Connections
fields.summary: Enable to monitor connections and ping server after periods of network inactivity. Please note that this generates extra traffic on the network.

fields.title: Default SSL/TLS TrustStore Location
fields.summary: The default PKCS12 keystore with your Certificate Authorities (.p12 file). May use this keystore for connections, or load per-connection Certificate Authorities.

fields.title: Default SSL/TLS Client Certificate Store
fields.summary: The default PKCS12 keystore with your client Certificate (.p12 file). May use this keystore for connections, or load per-connection client certifcates

fields.title: Default SSL/TLS Credentials
fields.summary: The default username and password for server connections. May use this for connections, or load per-connection credentials.

fields.title: Secure Server API port
fields.summary: Secure port of the Server API.

fields.title: Unsecure Server API port
fields.summary: Unsecure port of the Server API.

fields.title: Certificate Enrollment API port
fields.summary: Port for Certificate Enrollment API.

fields.title: Certificate Enrollment Key Length
fields.summary: Length in bits for RSA private key.

fields.title: Enable Client Certificate Export
fields.summary: Allows exporting of certificates obtained via enrollment.

fields.title: Apply TAK Server profile updates
fields.summary: Enable to allow ATAK and plugins to import server profiles (e.g. settings and data) from TAK Server.

fields.title: Enable Mesh Network Mode
fields.summary: Enable to allow multicast traffic. Disable to override and disable all inputs and outputs.

fields.title: Configure AES-256 Mesh Encryption
fields.summary: Allows for management AES-256 encryption of mesh network traffic.

fields.title: Auto Manage Mesh Network Self SA Mode
fields.summary: Enable to automatically prefer sending data over the server if connected instead of the local mesh network. Recommended for some VPN configurations

fields.title: Manage Inputs
fields.summary: Add and remove inputs (Advanced)

fields.title: Manage Outputs
fields.summary: Add and remove outputs (Advanced)

fields.title: TCP Connection Timeout
fields.summary: How long (in seconds) to wait for TCP connections to complete. Shorter values make failed connections happen sooner (more responsive), but if the value is too short for your network then you may get spurious connection failures

fields.title: Multicast Network Rejoin interval
fields.summary: Interval between Multicast Network rejoin attempts (in seconds). Zero indicates do not try to rejoin.

fields.title: Multicast TTL
fields.summary: Multicast TTL for outgoing multicast (requires restart).

fields.title: Multicast Traffic Loopback
fields.summary: Unless instructed, do not enable Multicast Traffic Loopback unless you are using another application on the same device to listen to traffic being sent by this application.   This will cause degradation in the performance of the network handling on this device because causes all outgoing traffic to be processed as incoming data to this application.    Filters exist to protect this application from consuming data it is generating, but require resources to run.

fields.title: QUIC Protocol
fields.summary: Enable the use of the QUIC protocol for direct device-to-device messaging on a mesh network. For server (streaming) connections, QUIC needs to be enabled in the servers specific configuration page. It is recommend to disable the \'Monitor Server Connections\' to further reduce server related network traffic unless required for your network.

fields.title: Enable Streaming Server on VPN Only
fields.summary: Only allow for a streaming server connection when a VPN is present and enabled. If the VPN is not running, the server connections will be disabled.

fields.title: Point-to-Point Link High Speed Capable
fields.summary: When selected, the Point-to-Point link on the system is considered high speed capable. This should not be enabled unless instructed. Newer radios are capable of supporting high speed tunnels that are point to point. Older radios support serial based point to point connections that are not high speed capable. For those older radios, turning this on will oversaturate link effectively disabling the capability.

fields.title: Legacy Wave Relay Redirect
fields.summary: Enable when using ATAK with a Wave Relay Radio when the Wave Relay Radio Control Plugin is not installed. It is recommended that users install the Wave Relay Radio Plugin.

fields.title: Enable VPN Proxy Mode
fields.summary: On some VPN proxies, https calls are rewritten in such a way that required more permissive handling on the connection. This should only be enabled if running one of these VPN clients.

fields.title: Gateway System Interoperability
fields.summary: On certain gateway systems, directed messages need to contain information on how to relay the message. Only enable if this is required.

fields.title: GPS Option
fields.summary: Select method of obtaining a location fix.

options.label: Ignore Internal GPS / Use External or Network GPS Only
External or Network GPS / Fallback Internal GPS

fields.title: Network GPS Port
fields.summary: Network port to listen on for incoming GPS/position updates.   This usually does not need to be modified; only modify this setting when directed to do so.   For some radios, such as the PRC-161, where the positional data is sent out over the network - this field should not be modified.

fields.title: Use GPS Time
fields.summary: If true, the device will use GPS time when available.

fields.title: Use Elevation Data instead of GPS Elevation
fields.summary: Discards GPS supplied elevation data in favor of digital terrain elevation data (DTED)

fields.title: Server Connections
fields.summary: Adjust network connections

fields.title: Network Connection Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust network connections

fields.title: Datalink Preferences
fields.summary: Adjust Datalink Messages Preferences

fields.title: Activate from widget on left side of map
Activate from widget above local device location widget.
External Night Vision Application Settings
fields.summary: Adjust Night Vision settings

fields.title: Enable Night Vision control inside ATAK
fields.summary: If enabled, a Night Vision Activation Method will be available within ATAK

fields.title: Enabled on Start
fields.summary: Show off-screen indicators on start.

fields.title: Set Distance Threshold (KM)
fields.summary: The distance from viewpoint at which off-screen indicators won\'t show in KM, 0 for no threshold.

fields.title: Set Timeout Threshold (seconds) or zero to disable
fields.summary: If a map item has been on the screen for more than the specified timeout and has not been touched, the offscreen indicator will be removed. Team members will always show an offscreen indicator. Zero will disable the timeout capability.

fields.title: Save Preferences
fields.summary: Save the current preference settings

fields.title: Load Preferences
fields.summary: Load preference settings from file

fields.title: Import Preferences Action
fields.summary: Select the action to take when importing a preference file.

fields.title: Prepare for Cloning / Clear Device unique information
fields.summary: Touch to prepare the application for cloning purposes. Clears the callsign and device unique identifier, and then exits the application. Once the application exits, do not rerun. Clone the Android system. When the application is run on a cloned device, this information is recreated.

fields.title: Send Contact Information
fields.summary: Send contact information announcements over the network.  Please take note that disabling this may impact some features and functionality.   If it is desired to send contact announcement but obfuscate or hide your location, then see \'Hide my current position\'.

fields.title: Hide my current position
fields.summary: This allows for people to chat or send you items without knowing your current position. If an emergency alert is sent, the alert will contain your current position.

fields.title: Restore my location on restart
fields.summary: In a GPS denied area, allows for your self marker to be placed at the last known location when restarting ATAK

fields.title: Reporting Strategy
fields.summary: Specifies whether to report location at a constant rate or dynamically send more often when moving

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Stationary (Mesh)
fields.summary: Reporting rate in seconds (e.g. once per 30 seconds when standing still) for unreliable protocols (e.g. multicast). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Minimum (Mesh)
fields.summary: Minimum reporting rate in seconds (e.g. once per 20 seconds when moving slow) for unreliable protocols (e.g. multicast). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Maximum (Mesh)
fields.summary: Maximum reporting rate in seconds (e.g. every other second when moving fast) for unreliable protocols (e.g. multicast). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Stationary (Server)
fields.summary: Reporting rate in seconds (e.g. once per 180 seconds when standing still) for reliable protocols (e.g. TAK Server). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Minimum (Server)
fields.summary: Minimum reporting rate in seconds (e.g. once per 20 seconds when moving slow) for reliable protocols (e.g. TAK Server). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Dynamic Reporting Rate Maximum (Server)
fields.summary: Maximum reporting rate in seconds (e.g. every other second when moving fast) for reliable protocols (e.g. TAK Server). Note: other events may also trigger reporting (e.g. a callsign change)

fields.title: Constant Reporting Rate (Mesh)
fields.summary: Constant interval between reporting self-SA messages in seconds for unreliable protocols (e.g. multicast)

fields.title: Constant Reporting Rate (Server)
fields.summary: Constant interval between reporting self-SA messages in seconds for reliable protocols (e.g. TAK Server)

fields.title: Report Location before obtaining location fix
fields.summary: If true, report SA message with (lat=0,lon=0) before either GPS fix or manual placement of self-marker.

fields.title: Report the TAK version number as part of the SA message
fields.summary: As part of SA message, report the tak version for enhanced situational awareness

fields.title: Elevation Profile Interpolate Altitudes
fields.summary: Enable to interpolate elevation profile graph altitudes from nearby route points. Disable to use DTED altitudes.

fields.title: Elevation Profile Center on Seeker
fields.summary: Enable to focus map on elevation profile graph seeker marker (blue dot).

fields.title: GPX Import Checkpoints
fields.summary: Enable to create checkpoint for each named GPX route point. Disable to create checkpoints only for GPX checkpoints along the route.

fields.title: Ignore Elevation Data
fields.summary: If enabled, the exported route will not contain any elevation data and the user would need to provide their own altitude information which may have higher or lower accuracy. If disabled, the elevation data contained within the route will be written to the file.

fields.title: Status
fields.summary: EUD is not currently linked with TAK.GOV Account

fields.title: Map Sources
fields.summary: Allow download of available map sources from TAK.GOV

fields.title: Plugins Listing
fields.summary: Allow download of available plugins from TAK.GOV

fields.title: Range and Bearing Line Distance Format
fields.summary: Select whether to display slant range (accounting for altitude change) or display ground clamped distances

fields.title: Display ETA on Range and Bearing Labels
fields.summary: If checked, an attempt will be made to compute ETA based on your range and current speed. If speed cannot be detected, it can be manually entered through the Range and Bearing details.

fields.title: Set Domain Preference
fields.summary: Updates various naming conventions based upon selected domain type. Supported actions: Ground: imagery tab set to IMAGERY, Aviation: imagery tab set to MAPS, Maritime: imagery tab set to IMAGERY

fields.title: Disable audio support
fields.summary: Ignores audio in all video streams

fields.title: Mute Video when not Visible
fields.summary: Mute the video when the drop down is not showing but playing in the background

fields.title: Record UDP Tool
fields.summary: Allows for recording of UDP traffic to a file for playback by developers. Only should be used in case there is an issue playing a video that is being streamed by UDP

fields.title: Enable Volume Keys rotating map layers
fields.summary: If checked, volume keys switch maps. Otherwise, use device default volume behavior.

fields.title: Enable Image Overlay Map Interaction
fields.summary: Enable to allow interaction with Image Overlays on the map when the outline is visible.   If no outline is visible, then the Image Overlay cannot be interacted with.  If this is false, no interaction can occur even if the outline is visible.

fields.title: Overlay Manager (Image Overlays) Mass Visibility Toggle
fields.summary: In the overlay manager, allow for the mass visibility toggle for all image overlays at once. This does not impact the individual data package visibility toggle.

fields.title: Enable Smart Cache
fields.summary: Enables predictive download and cache of map tiles in the background.

fields.title: Smart Cache Download Limit
fields.summary: Maximum download size in bytes for an individual smart cache request. Default: 5000000 bytes (5 MB).
